overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character in formal attire walking along a desert-city sidewalk. The scene features a distinctive glass pyramid building in the background, multi-story parking structures, and sparse desert vegetation alongside a multi-lane road with light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial sidewalk with modern commercial landmarks

events.description: motorcycle passes by on the left road traveling in the same direction

agents.ego_description: Character in red vest and white shirt walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk toward the distant pyramid building

notable_agents.action: motorcycle traveling same direction as camera, overtaking on the road
pedestrian in purple shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: Large black glass pyramid-shaped skyscraper dominating the skyline ahead
Multi-story concrete parking garage with open levels extending along the road
White dome-shaped structure adjacent to the pyramid building
Sparse desert trees and dry vegetation lining the right side of the sidewalk
Tall metal street lamp posts along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a concrete sidewalk in a desert-urban environment, with the distinctive glass pyramid building visible in the distance ahead. Sparse Joshua trees line the right side while a multi-story parking structure runs parallel on the left. A motorcycle passes by on the road, and pedestrians occasionally walk toward the camera from the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression along a desert-urban sidewalk toward a distant architectural landmark. It begins with the character walking past a multi-story parking structure on the left, while sparse Joshua trees line the right side of the concrete path. As the camera advances, the environment remains open and arid, with a motorcycle passing on the adjacent road and pedestrians moving in the opposite direction. The scene then maintains its focus on the horizon, where the distinctive glass pyramid building grows more prominent against the desert sky.
